meaning: adj.有皱纹的,易生皱纹的n.<俚>老人,中年人
examples: Harry might have saved Griphook's wrinkly skin at the end of Deathly Hallows Part 1, but that doesn't mean the goblin is ready to join the fight .
He gazed with deep feeling at his mother's wrinkly face.
Excuse my wrinkly hands - I never knew they looked like that!
Of course, the Celtics are the Celtics, wrinkly and experienced, and they will not be an easy out.
Lulled by the swaying of your wrinkly mount, you suddenly emerge from thick brush onto the savannah, catching sight of a herd of impala.
